hooks.command:
echo '## Critical Rules
- NEVER use QML animation values in C++ business logic
- ALWAYS null-check screen() before using
- ALWAYS build after each file edit
- Check docs/kde/ before using any KDE API
- Surface height MUST include animation overflow
- Input region: empty QRegion = accept ALL input, not none
- ONE authoritative mouse tracking level (panel, not item)
- Performance: GPU acceleration mandatory when available
- Feature planning: consult specialist agents first

## Session State Preservation
- MUST preserve .claude/work-state.md content across compaction
- MUST preserve current task objective, progress, and test scenarios
- MUST preserve product-quality test results if in testing phase'
